## What

Brief description of the change.

## Why

Context and motivation for the change.

## Checklist

- [ ] `npm run lint` passes
- [ ] `npm run build` succeeds
- [ ] Tested at 375px (iPhone SE) in DevTools
- [ ] Follows coding conventions in `CLAUDE.md`
- [ ] No `transition-all` or `hover:scale-*` on tappable elements
- [ ] No secrets or `.env` values committed

## Screenshots

If UI changed, include before/after screenshots.
